title: Sanger sequencing
steps: Label 1.5 mL tubes with barcodes from sequencing company
. Add template (400 to 500 ng), primer and water (10 uL total volume, details below) %s %s uL per Reaction BarcodeTemplatePrimerTemplate#ERROR! 10 uM Primer2.5 Water#ERROR! Total Volume10.0
Place tubes inside a small plastic bag and drop off in sequecing company collection Box
Results are usually ready to download from the sequecing companys website
creator: Igem Dusseldorf
